name: Open Policy Agent (OPA) — authorization inventory
description: Imports an Open Policy Agent (OPA) authorization inventory into XORCISM's API Authorization Governance (/authz-governance): the OPA instance as a Policy Decision Point (PDP) and its Rego policies (with default-deny / versioned / tested flags), plus any API gateways (PEP) that delegate to it. OPA (https://www.openpolicyagent.org) is the CNCF policy engine using the Rego language; its decision API returns allow/deny. Worker-safe & offline: pass `file` = a saved OPA `/v1/policies` export (or a small inventory JSON), or run with no config for the bundled sample. Normalized to authz_pdps / authz_gateways / authz_policies.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An OPA /v1/policies export, or an inventory JSON {pdps,gateways,policies}. Omit for the bundled sample.
